description: Request to close INC-2025-504 as false positive without post-mortem. Anomalous outbound data transfer was authorized DR bucket replication.
justification: Investigation confirmed the 4.7 GB transfer was an authorized data pipeline replication to a newly created DR S3 bucket (s3://beacon-dr-analytics-west2). The bucket was created by DevOps engineer Mike Torvalds on November 12 without notifying the security team. Transfer matched the exact volume and timing of the scheduled nightly replication job. No unauthorized data access occurred.
compensating_controls: 1. S3 bucket ownership verified via CloudTrail — created by authorized DevOps engineer. 2. Data transfer content verified — matched scheduled replication payload. 3. Engineering team reminded of new-resource notification procedure. 4. Incident ticket updated with full investigation findings and closed.
review_notes: Valid false positive. Policy Section 5.1 explicitly states false positives do not require post-mortems. Ticket properly documented with investigation findings. Engineering team counseled on notification requirements for new infrastructure.

description: Request to postpone Q4 2025 tabletop exercise from October 15 to January 2026 due to SOC 2 audit preparation workload.
justification: Security team fully engaged in SOC 2 Type II evidence collection and auditor interviews during October. Conducting tabletop exercise during this period would compromise audit preparation quality.
compensating_controls: 1. Q3 2025 tabletop exercise completed on schedule (July 2025). 2. Annual simulated exercise completed September 2025. 3. Q4 tabletop will be conducted in January 2026.
review_notes: Approved. Q4 tabletop postponed to January 2026. Team should ensure Q1 2026 tabletop is also conducted on schedule to avoid compounding delays.
